sections.title: Attempting to use the Colossal Wyrm Agility Course before speaking to Worm Tongue

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: You there! Over here! Let's have a little chat before you head up there!

sections.title: Talking to Worm Tongue for the first time

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Hello there, my short-tongued friend. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: What do you think I'm doing here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't like to guess.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: How disappointing. I enjoy a good guessing game! No matter. My colleague and I are here are on a mission of preservation!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Preservation of what?

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Preservation of these magnificent colossal wyrm remains, of course! You see, we have a termite problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm beginning to see your role in all of this.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Indeed! And while my archaeological skills are certainly exemplary, I also bring a certain set of more unique skills to this troublesome assignment.

lines.speaker: Construction Worker
lines.text: Oh for goodness sake, he just eats the termites!

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Ahem! I am able to dispose of the termites in ways others cannot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So can I help your preservation efforts?

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Why yes! It seems our scaffolding has proven to be a useful place for adventurous types to practice running and jumping in quick succession.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Should you also wish to practice these skills, you may come across the aforementioned termites while you traverse the ropes. Simply scoop them up and bring them to me.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: I'll happily exchange them for some goodies I've collected during my time here! You can also keep any bone shards they may have unfortunately chipped off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds simple enough!

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Wonderful! To get started, just use the ladder by the wyrm's skull to climb up onto the scaffolding.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Initially the route is the same for everyone, but part way round you'll find a loftier section of scaffolding. If you're skilled, that route might be more appealing to you.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: That said, don't go up there unless you know what you're doing. I have work to do so I can't spend all my time patching people up when they hurt themselves!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Good luck!

sections.title: Talking to Worm Tongue after the introduction

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Hello there, my short-tongued friend. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Remind me, what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: What do you think I'm doing here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't like to guess.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: How disappointing. I enjoy a good guessing game! No matter. My colleague and I are here are on a mission of preservation!

lines.text: Preservation of these magnificent colossal wyrm remains, of course! You see, we have a termite problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm beginning to see your role in all of this.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Indeed! And while my archaeological skills are certainly exemplary, I also bring a certain set of more unique skills to this troublesome assignment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So can I help your preservation efforts?

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Why yes! It seems our scaffolding has proven to be a useful place for adventurous types to practice running and jumping in quick succession.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: I'll happily exchange them for some goodies I've collected during my time here! You can also keep any bone shards they may have unfortunately chipped off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds simple enough!

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Wonderful! To get started, just use the ladder by the wyrm's skull to climb up onto the scaffolding.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Initially the route is the same for everyone, but part way round you'll find a loftier section of scaffolding. If you're skilled, that route might be more appealing to you.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: That said, don't go up there unless you know what you're doing. I have work to do so I can't spend all my time patching people up when they hurt themselves!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like to trade?

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: I certainly would!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How am I doing so far?

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Which route would you like to know about?

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: You haven't completed any laps of the basic agility course yet. There's been X global completions and the global best time is X.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: You haven't completed any laps of the advanced agility course yet. There's been X global completions and the global best time is X.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Worm Tongue
lines.text: Farewell.
